creator: kuma@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
There is no -M option in 'GROUP OPTIONS' section in pw.8 manual 
	pages, although we can see it in 'SYNOPSIS'.  After 5 minutes of my
	examination, I believe that the description of '-M option' merged
	into the previous description of '-g' option.

Fix: Apply the following patch to 'pw.8'.
How-To-Repeat: 
	....
